DOE SUBSTITUTION MOTION, PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62283698) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SARAH, LETNER LETNER III, RICHARD HEARING SET FOR AUG-20-2018 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-20-2018 HEARING ON PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO SUBSTITUTE ROBERT BUSH FOR DOE 1, THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED. ALTHOUGH THE MOVING PAPERS REFER TO A DECLARATION BY PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL, NO SUCH DECLARATION WAS FILED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM/MTORREANO@SFTC.ORG. (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2019 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2018 Continued To Mar-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance for the plaintiff. Appearance for the defendant. The Arbitrator's jurisdicton is extended to Feb-04-2019 pursuant to the parties' stipulation. The Arbitration Order To Show Cause is re-set to Mar-05-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: NEWTON LAM; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Doe Substitution Motion
Off Calendar Aug-20-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearance, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiffs' motion to substitute Robert Bush for DOE 1 is denied without prejudice to being refiled. Although the moving papers refer to a declaration by plaintiffs' counsel, no such declaration was filed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com/mtorreano@sftc.org. =(302/HEK)
